news.t: Horizon Investments Sponsors Its First Exchange Traded Funds, Names Clark Allen as Head of ETFs

overview.description: The Horizon Landmark ETF (BENJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds ultra-short term US treasuries, combined with a variety of option strategies. The fund seeks to provide total return. BENJ was launched on Jan 22, 2025 and is issued by Horizon.

data.title: Horizon Investments Sponsors Its First Exchange Traded Funds, Names Clark Allen as Head of ETFs
data.text: CHARLOTTE, N.C.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Horizon Investments today named Clark Allen Head of ETFs and launched its first two Exchange Traded Funds.
